title: Convert User dict factory to a @dataclass
description: Refactor the User dict factory in src/user.py to a Python @dataclass. Preserve all existing field names and type the extra_data field as dict[str, int].

variant.spec_text: Convert the User class in `src/user.py` from a plain dict factory to a Python @dataclass. Keep all existing field names. The `extra_data` field holds a dict of per-user metadata. Type it as `dict[str, int]`. All existing tests in `tests/test_user.py` must continue to pass.
